name: Consolidated Bus Resources
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER carrier record found for the exact name 'Consolidated Bus Resources' at 16 Mountain Ave, West Orange, NJ 07052. SAFER keyword search returned only 'Consolidated Bus Transit Inc' (USDOT 4036598, Brooklyn NY) and 'Central City Consolidated Busing' (Milwaukee WI) — neither matches the NJ address. NJ Division of Revenue/Treasury business name search did not return public results via web search for this exact entity. Possible explanations: defunct or very small operator, a parent/holding company without DOT authority, or a name variant. Manual lookup on njportal.com/DOR/BusinessNameSearch recommended for confirmation.

name: Claxton Bus Lines Inc
safety_rating: None (last compliance review 2006-09-20, no rating assigned)
fmcsa_address: Powell, TN (2628 Clinton Hwy, Powell, TN 37849 per company site)
fmcsa_status: inactive (USDOT 533644 record shown INACTIVE in SAFER)
entity_status: active (company website and chamber profile confirm operating)
registry_source: TN Secretary of State (tnbear.tn.gov) — not directly confirmed via web search; company self-reports >40 years of operations to Anderson County Schools
notes: Claxton Bus Lines, Inc. operates 13 school buses certified by TN Dept of Safety (per company website) serving Anderson County Schools for 40+ years. Historical USDOT 533644 / MC 32091 is now INACTIVE in SAFER (last compliance review 09/20/2006); a third-party bubba.ai profile lists DBA 'Landreth School Bus Services Inc' for that DOT number. SCU Bus Lines LLC (USDOT 2907952, MC 979093, active, 21 power units, 40 drivers) operates from the SAME physical address (2628 Clinton Hwy, Powell, TN) — likely a related/successor entity but not confirmed as the same legal owner of Claxton brand. Power_units (13) reflects Claxton's self-reported fleet, not the inactive SAFER record. TN entity filing date and officers list not directly retrievable via public web search.

name: Jay's Bus Svc Inc
inc_date: 2008-09 (founded September 2008 per multiple sources; exact NJ filing date not confirmed)
officers: Jay Ellinson (founder/owner per company website and industry sources)
entity_status: active (operating; NJ School Bus Contractors Assoc member)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (njportal.com) — not directly confirmed via web search; founding year confirmed via D&B/Buzzfile/Crunchbase profiles
notes: Strong match: FMCSA SAFER snapshot for USDOT 1926134 shows legal name JAY'S BUS SERVICE INC at 672 Cross Street, Lakewood, NJ 08701 — same town as input address (180 Park Ave S, Lakewood). Input address may be a yard/secondary location. Fleet has grown from ~5 buses (2008) to 297 power units (FMCSA, MCS-150 dated 04/20/2026). Company also has Tinton Falls and Middletown NJ yards. Satisfactory safety rating reaffirmed at most recent review. NJ corporate filing date not directly returned via web search; founder Jay Ellinson well documented.

name: Guardian School Bus Co
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM) — NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire
inc_date: 1988 (founded year per Dun & Bradstreet directory; exact MN SOS filing date not confirmed)
entity_status: active (operating; serves St. Cloud Area School District 742)
registry_source: MN Secretary of State (mblsportal.sos.state.mn.us) — not directly confirmed via web search; founding year from D&B / ZoomInfo profiles
notes: Strong match on legal name and address: FMCSA SAFER USDOT 881397 = GUARDIAN SCHOOL BUS COMPANY, 2779 Highway 10 SE, St Cloud, MN 56304, matching input address (2779 Highway 10 S, Saint Cloud, MN 56304). Fleet 21 power units / 23 drivers (MCS-150 dated 04/06/2006 — note MCS-150 is dated, may understate current fleet vs. third-party revenue estimates of $6.7M / 25 employees). Founded 1988, operates exclusively intrastate for St. Cloud Area School District 742. Do NOT confuse with 'Guardian Bus Company Inc' (USDOT 2462291, Oceanside NY) which is a separate larger NY-based operator.

name: Clearcut Inc Which Will Do Bus
officers: David Alfred Artinian (CEO); Boonlam Nong Artinian (Secretary); registered agent David Alfred Artinian
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov) — Entity Number C3333964, foreign stock corporation registered from Oregon, DBA 'CLEARCUT INC. WHOLESALE'
notes: This is NOT a student transportation / school bus operator. The full CA SOS entity name 'CLEARCUT, INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS CLEARCUT INC. WHOLESALE' is an Oregon foreign stock corp registered in CA on 11/16/2010, classified by D&B/Dun & Bradstreet under Jewelry, Luggage, and Leather Goods Retailers (import wholesale). Principal address 12975 Brookprinter Pl #110, Poway, CA 92064 matches input. FMCSA SAFER keyword search for 'CLEARCUT' returned 10 carriers but none located in CA or Poway. This row appears to be a misclassification in the source list (likely captured because the entity name contains the substring 'Bus' from 'Business'). Flag for removal from school-bus tuck-in universe.
